elements.name: require(bool,string)(balanceAfter >= balanceBefore + fee,Flash loan not repaid)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FlashLoanVault.flashLoan(uint256,address,bytes) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#59-83):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- require(bool,string)(token.transfer(receiver,amount),Transfer failed) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#69)
	Balance read before the call:
	- balanceBefore = token.balanceOf(address(this)) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#63)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- require(bool,string)(balanceAfter >= balanceBefore + fee,Flash loan not repaid) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#79)
		- stale variable `balanceBefore`

detectors.description:
FlashLoanVault.removeCollateral(uint256) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#182-190) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- newCollateralValue = ((collateral[msg.sender] - amount) * getTokenPrice()) / 1e18 (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#185)
	- require(bool,string)(newCollateralValue * 100 >= borrowed[msg.sender] * COLLATERAL_RATIO,Would be undercollateralized) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#186)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FlashLoanVault.flashLoan(uint256,address,bytes) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#59-83):
	External calls:
	- require(bool,string)(token.transfer(receiver,amount),Transfer failed) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#69)
	- (success,None) = receiver.call(data) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#73)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- flashLoanLock = false (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#81)
	FlashLoanVault.flashLoanLock (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#37) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FlashLoanVault.flashLoan(uint256,address,bytes) (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#59-83)
	- FlashLoanVault.flashLoanLock (../data/audit/FlashLoanVault.sol#37)
